## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 💡 New detection rule
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] ⚙️ Refactor / internal improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] New rule includes `message`, `impact`, `fix`, and `severity` fields
- [ ] `fix` field contains exact RouterOS CLI syntax
- [ ] A test case was added in `tests/` if this is a new rule
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` section updated
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug code left in
